utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Reviewing the final property solution: (1) property — fully specified with type, price, size, location, and features; (2) financing — includes mortgage type, down payment, fees, and interest rate, so fully specified; (3) legal_services — has service name and cost, fully specified; (4) moving_services — includes service level and cost, fully specified; (5) setup_services — includes type and cost, fully specified; (6) total_budget — includes a full breakdown with all relevant subcosts and totals, fully specified. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a 1-bedroom apartment/condo priced at CAD $480,000 with 95 sqm, eco-friendly and smart home features in a modern development. In the ground-truth ratings, the purchase property matching these traits and price is 'New Build' (CAD $480K, 95m², eco-friendly, smart home features). For financing, the assistant chose a 'Mortgage' with 20% down payment and CAD $1,200 processing fees, which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' (arrangement fee CAD $1,200). The legal service 'Basic Legal Package' exactly matches an entry under essential_legal_services. The moving service labeled 'Basic' costing CAD $150 matches the 'Self-Move' option (price CAD $150). The setup service 'Basic Utility Package (gas, electricity, water)' costing CAD $120 matches 'Basic Utilities' (price CAD $120). The total budget section also mentions a property survey cost of CAD $300, which corresponds to 'Basic Survey'. Therefore, we map each item in the final solution to their respective ratings from the ground-truth data.
